overview: A modular isometric tile-based tactics RPG with chess-inspired combat, procedural maps, and a carved-stone dark slate UI with crimson accent.
features: Turn-based tactical battles with chess piece characters
Procedurally generated maps with various archetypes
Character management with three persistent slots
Spell system with buffs, debuffs, and elemental effects
Real-time battle HUD with initiative timeline and spell bar
Click-to-inspect stat popup on initiative portraits
